title: crepis hellenica
intro: Crepis hellenica, also known as Hellenic Hawk's Beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Crepis hellenica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it accessible as a natural remedy for various health concerns.
